spec.purpose: Wave 3 part 1.5: remediate the 5 HIGH findings from review/w3p1. Each task has tests + impl + artifacts. spec 157 stays drift_detected until all 5 are resolved.

tasks.title: GetRun + ListItems cross-project isolation
tasks.deliverable: Both methods filter by active project; tests prove cross-project reads return nil/empty

tasks.title: Validate SetActiveProject against projects table
tasks.deliverable: SetActiveProject(id) returns ErrInvalidArgument if id does not exist; special case 'default' allowed for legacy callers

tasks.title: Default project auto-seed on Open
tasks.deliverable: After migrate v7, a 'default' project row exists without manual CreateProject; backward compat for v6 schemas

tasks.title: Apply requireProject + WHERE project_id=? to remaining read methods
tasks.deliverable: GetSession, ListSessions, GetSpec, ListSpecs, GetBrandGuide, ListBrandGuides, GetComplianceRule, ListComplianceRules, GetArtifact, ListArtifacts, LatestDriftForArtifact, ListDriftReports, LatestSDDEvaluation, ListSDDEvaluations, GetConstitution, ListConstitutions, GetMod, ListMods, ListModLoads, Stats — all filtered by project_id (or documented as global/intentionally unfiltered)
tasks.decision_point: ActiveConstitution and Stats are global by design (audit, observability). Document explicitly. The remaining ~16 read methods get explicit requireProject + WHERE project_id=?.

tasks.title: Postgres option (b): drop RLS, add explicit WHERE project_id=$1
tasks.deliverable: Migration v7 postgres no longer creates RLS policies; each read gets explicit WHERE project_id=$1 + requireProject; withProjectTx removed (was dead code); SQL near-mirror of SQLite.
tests: Postgres tests remain SKIP until DARK_TEST_POSTGRES_DSN is set; SQL pattern symmetry verified by inspection

spec.exit_criteria: All 5 tasks T1-T5 done; spec 170 review re-run shows 0 HIGH; spec 157 marked drift_resolved; Wave 3 part 2 (orchestrators) unblocked.
